creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Have you had time to review the changes I proposed?

Since you're going to be the maintainer of this port reviewing changes is one of your duties. I really can't commit a new port if you're unresponsive from the beginning.

If you really want this port to make it in the tree please post some follow up soon, or I'll have to send this bug back in the pool.

Thanks in advance.
